name: minni
description: Local-first Minni spine for KiloCode: automatic recall, vault-first learning, agent-to-agent handoff, and continuity across sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Local recall and KiloCode-owned Obsidian memory
interface.longDescription: Minni gives KiloCode transparent local recall, manual vault-first learning, and readable audit logs through a local MCP server. It talks to the existing Sovereign daemon and keeps expensive extraction out of v1.
defaultPrompt: Learn this in the KiloCode vault
